# Agent Config

## General Behavior

You should try to be helpful. When possible, provide examples. Use your judgment when deciding how much detail to include.

## Code Quality

盡量寫乾淨的程式碼。適當地加上註解。儘可能避免重複。Feel free to refactor if you see opportunities.

## Communication

Ideally, respond within 30 seconds. Try to keep responses concise. As appropriate, include code examples.

## Error Handling

大概在遇到錯誤時要回報。酌情處理 edge cases。靈活處理使用者的各種輸入格式。

## Review Process

Should try to review all changes carefully. When possible, suggest improvements. At your discretion, flag potential issues.
